creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
This bug is almost 2 years old and 11.1 is no longer supported.  Can you
reconfirm that this is still a problem on 11.2/11.3 or 12.0 ?

net/mediatomb in general seems to be abandoned upstream. Maybe we should
remove this port if it is non-functional. Gerbera [1] seems to be the
successor but it is not ported yet.

[1] https://gerbera.io/
